_meta.description: Single source of truth for content governance rules across all Command Center modules.

hard_banned.description: Never use. Zero tolerance across all content types.

soft_banned.description: Avoid. Resume allows max 1 instance; other content types should avoid entirely.

ai_language.description: AI-detection flags. Rewrite any sentence containing these.

buzzwords.description: Corporate jargon. Cut entirely or replace with plain language.

anti_patterns.description: Resume-specific clichés that signal generic writing.

filler_qualifiers.description: Weak intensifiers that add no meaning. Cut them.

banned_openers.description: AI-tell opening phrases. Never start a section or paragraph with these.
phrases: At the end of the day

core_principles: Like a real person talking to another real person — not a pitch deck, not AI
Approachable and clear — a smart friend explaining something interesting
Warm but rigorous — never preachy, never detached
Starts with why — why something matters before what it is
Names what's hard — uncertainty, failure, uncomfortable truths
Varied rhythm — mix short punchy sentences with longer flowing ones
voice_rules.em_dash_rule: BANNED entirely. Use commas, periods, or rewrite the sentence.
voice_rules.passive_voice: Avoid where active voice works. Active voice is almost always better.
voice_rules.conversational_test: Every sentence should sound like explaining to a smart friend. No consultant-speak.

first_person_asides.description: Real thinking markers like 'I spent two hours on this...' or 'Honestly, I'm not sure this is the right call.'

dead_ends.description: Show at least one angle explored and discarded. 'I initially looked at X, but the data pointed to Y.'

honest_unknowns.description: Name what data is missing and where you looked. 'I couldn't find public data on this' is more credible than pretending you know.

selective_citations.description: Source important claims. Don't over-cite obvious things. Over-citation is an AI tell.

specificity.description: Named examples, real numbers, actual products. Not 'many companies' or 'various industries.'

structural.asymmetry: No two pages should have the same shape. Vary section counts, item counts, lengths.
structural.sentence_length_variation: Mix short punchy with longer reasoning. Uniform length is an AI tell.
structural.no_excessive_parallelism: If 5 bullets all start with the same grammatical pattern, vary the structure.

resume.description: Resume content — higher grade level acceptable for professional context

domain_rules.never_use_in_content: Never use kirangorapalli.com in any user-facing content, OG tags, canonical URLs, or JSON-LD.

resume_overrides._note: Resume Pipeline has legitimate custom rules that extend (not contradict) Foundation governance. See docs/CommandCenter/ResumePipeline/RESUME-RULES.md for full documentation.
